source: SIFMA US corporate issuance (annual/quarterly) + documented record months
note: IG issuance boom: ~$1.21T (2023) → ~$1.50T (2024) → ~$1.65T (2025); 2026 total corp is running +28% YoY (H1 $1.52T) with a record $208bn January. High new-issue activity drives secondary turnover (the +95% YoY HG-turnover episode). Shown at annual/quarterly granularity — drop the SIFMA monthly workbook into data_raw/ for the full monthly series (press monthly figures are not basis-consistent).
